title: Task 5: 前端设置界面支持 (AC: 2, 3)
summary: Implementation correctly adds window whitelist/blacklist UI with tag input, '仅捕获白名单应用' toggle, and proper persistence to backend settings. All 16 frontend tests pass. Backend integration verified with 9 passing tests. Code follows Vue 3 patterns and project conventions.

issues.description: Unrelated test 'get_today_record_count_sync_excludes_yesterday_records' fails due to parallel test interference with shared DB connection. This is a pre-existing issue not introduced by this task.

strengths: Tag input UX is clean: Enter to add, ✕ to remove, duplicates prevented
JSON parsing in loadSettings() has try/catch fallback to empty array
Settings save correctly serializes tag arrays to JSON strings
Test coverage includes add/remove tags, toggle state, and persistence
UI styling consistent with existing settings sections
Backend field names match frontend (window_whitelist, window_blacklist, use_whitelist_only)
